_meta.owner: Sir 真愿景 Phase 4 — wants_voice 未 surface ageing + spotlight
_meta.design_doc: AGENTS.md §1 准则 6 三维耦合 (持久化 + CLI 可改)
_meta.purpose: 控制 wants_voice ★ entry 的 ageing 阈值 + spotlight 显示 + surface 检测参数. 不写死, Sir 可调.
_meta.cli: scripts/inner_voice_aging_dump.py (Sir 直接改 JSON 也行)

spotlight.max_pending_min_note: wants_voice=True 且未 surface 超过此 min, 仍提到 prompt SPOTLIGHT 段顶 (60 = 1 小时)
spotlight.spotlight_header: ★ pending to surface to Sir (you have not mentioned these yet)
spotlight.spotlight_header_note: prompt spotlight 段标题, 让主脑明白这是未 surface 的 ★

ageing.ageing_max_age_sec_note: wants_voice=True ★ 超此 age (默 2h) 自动降级为 False (内存 mutate), 不再 spotlight. jsonl 不动 (history 留痕).
ageing.ageing_max_attempts_note: 出现在 prompt block 超此次数仍未 surface → 自动降级 (避免循环刷屏). default 6 = 6 次 turn 主脑都没接茬.

surface_detection.min_overlap_words_note: reply 含 entry content 头 N 词 token overlap >= 此值, 判 surface=True. 默 3 词足够区分 'hydration' 类主题, 不太严苛.
surface_detection.content_prefix_chars_note: entry.content 取前 N 字符抽 token, 用于 overlap 判断. 默 60 字符 ≈ 一句话头部.
surface_detection.min_token_len_note: 拆 token 时丢弃长度 < N 的虚词 (a/i/to/of). 默 3 → 'sir' / 'now' / 'why' 留, 'a' / 'i' 丢.
